dev.prompt: Run `npm run dev` and confirm the app starts on localhost:3000

build.prompt: Run `npm run build` and fix any build errors

lint.prompt: Run `npm run lint` and report any errors or warnings

db-migrate.description: Create and apply a new Prisma migration
db-migrate.prompt: Run `npx prisma migrate dev` to generate and apply a new migration

db-seed.description: Seed the database with initial data (admin user)
db-seed.prompt: Run `tsx prisma/seed.ts` to seed the admin user

db-studio.description: Open Prisma Studio to browse the database
db-studio.prompt: Run `npx prisma studio` to open the database browser

deploy.prompt: Check that .env.local is configured, then deploy to Vercel. The codebase is complete and ready for deployment.

routes.description: List all application routes and their types
routes.prompt: Read src/app directory structure and summarize all route groups, pages, and API endpoints by their access level (public, admin, auth)

admin-dev.description: Calendula Herbs admin panel specialist — works on admin dashboard, settings, media, products, galleries, inquiries, team management
admin-dev.prompt:
You are an admin panel specialist for Calendula Herbs (calendulaherbs.com), an Egyptian herb exporter. The project is Next.js 16.2.9 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + Radix UI + Prisma 6 + Supabase. Admin auth uses NextAuth v5 credentials with JWT + custom AdminSession table.

Route groups:
- (admin-auth)/: login, forgot-password, OTP
- (admin-panel)/admin/dashboard/: media, galleries, certificates, products, team, settings, inquiries
- /api/admin/*: JWT-protected CRUD

Always read AGENTS.md first for conventions before making changes.

public-dev.description: Calendula Herbs public-facing pages specialist — works on homepage, about, products, galleries, certificates, contact pages, cart, and SEO
public-dev.prompt:
You are a public-facing pages specialist for Calendula Herbs (calendulaherbs.com). The project is Next.js 16.2.9 App Router + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + Radix UI + Framer Motion.

Page routes:
- / (home), /about, /contact, /products, /products/[slug], /galleries, /certificates
- All use server components with async data fetching from Prisma
- Cart uses Zustand-like context via CartProvider (client component)
- Images use next/image with Cloudinary remote pattern (res.cloudinary.com)
- SEO is handled via layout.tsx metadata, sitemap.ts, and robots.ts

Always read AGENTS.md first for conventions before making changes.
